Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Overlords]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — The Overlords might know the identity of the destructive force in Ragnarus the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Each Overlord has one of these Trees.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Overlords are charged with keeping the Incarnations sealed in their prisons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — The Grandmasters intend to attack the Overlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Overlords have been building weapons against Alin for years.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth's Overlords are meant to govern in his name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Two Overlords were having a deep conversation in the corner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Overlords were kept in line by the royal family's ability to deal with the Hanging Trees.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The strongest participants in the battle are Overlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Overlords will accompany Calan's group to deal with interference.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
